targets.query:
from(bucket: "stb-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "triage_summary" and r._field == "compression_ratio")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "stb-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "triage_summary" and r._field == "failures")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "stb-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "triage_summary" and r._field == "clusters")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "stb-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "triage_cluster" and r._field == "size")
  |> group(columns: ["component"])
  |> sum()

from(bucket: "stb-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "triage_summary" and r._field == "compression_ratio")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "compression")

from(bucket: "stb-metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "triage_cluster" and r._field == "size")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> group(columns: ["component"])
  |> yield(name: "size")
